item.title: Universal HIGH INCOME via checks issued by the Federal government is the best way to deal with unemp...
item.description:
Universal HIGH INCOME via checks issued by the Federal government is the best way to deal with unemployment caused by AI.
AI/robotics will produce goods &amp; services far in excess of the increase in the money supply, so there will not be inflation.
--- @elonmusk | ❤️ 23982 | 🔁 2645 | 💬 6488 | 👁 3288914
item.author: @elonmusk
